Package BusinessLayer

Class Project

java.lang.Object
BusinessLayer.Project
public class Project extends Object
Represents a digital project consisting of multiple circuits. Each project has a name, contains multiple circuits, and can load/save its state using a persistent data storage (via the Storage interface). Supports operations such as creating new circuits, merging circuits, retrieving components, and managing connectors. This class acts as the main container in the simulator for all circuits in a project.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Project()
    Constructs a new Project with a default initial circuit ("Circuit 1").

  • Constructor Details

    • Project

      public Project()
      Constructs a new Project with a default initial circuit ("Circuit 1").

  • Method Details

    • createNewCircuit

      public void createNewCircuit()
      Creates a new circuit named "Circuit 1" and sets it as the current circuit.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the project name.
      Returns:
      the name of the project

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the project name.
      Parameters:
      name - the new project name

    • getcircuits

      public ArrayList<Circuit> getcircuits()
      Gets the list of circuits in the project.
      Returns:
      list of circuits

    • setcircuits

      public void setcircuits(ArrayList<Circuit> c)
      Sets the list of circuits in the project.
      Parameters:
      c - list of circuits to set

    • getCurrentCircuitName

      public String getCurrentCircuitName()
      Gets the name of the current circuit.
      Returns:
      current circuit name

    • setCurrentCircuitName

      public void setCurrentCircuitName(String name)
      Sets the current circuit name.
      Parameters:
      name - the circuit name to set as current

    • getCurrentCircuit

      public Circuit getCurrentCircuit()
      Gets the currently selected circuit.
      Returns:
      current Circuit object

    • getLastCircuit

      public Circuit getLastCircuit()
      Gets the last circuit added to the project.
      Returns:
      last Circuit, or null if no circuits exist

    • getCircuitByName

      public Circuit getCircuitByName(String name)
      Retrieves a circuit by its name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the circuit to retrieve
      Returns:
      the Circuit with the given name, or null if not found

    • mergeCircuits

      public void mergeCircuits(Circuit source, Circuit target)
      Merges components and connectors from a source circuit into a target circuit. Components are cloned and offset to avoid overlap. Connectors are updated to point to cloned components' pins.
      Parameters:
      source - the source circuit to merge from
      target - the target circuit to merge into
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if source and target are the same circuit

    • loadProject

      public void loadProject(String projectname)
      Loads a project from persistent storage by its name. Rebuilds all circuits, components, pins, and connectors from stored data.
      Parameters:
      projectname - the name of the project to load

    • saveData

      public void saveData()
      Saves the current project data to persistent storage. Includes all circuits, components, pins, and connectors.

    • getProjectNames

      public ArrayList<String> getProjectNames()
      Gets a list of all project names from storage.
      Returns:
      list of project names

    • removeCircuit

      public void removeCircuit(String project, String circuit)
      Deletes a circuit from a project in storage.
      Parameters:
      project - the project name
      circuit - the circuit name to delete
